title: Flagsmith Feature Flag
description: A feature flag definition in Flagsmith including its metadata, type, default configuration, and multivariate options. Feature flags are the core primitive in Flagsmith for controlling feature rollouts and remote configuration.

id.description: The unique identifier for this feature flag

name.description: The name of the feature flag, used as the key in SDK lookups

description.description: A human-readable description of the feature flag and its purpose

created_date.description: The date and time the feature flag was created

initial_value.description: The initial value assigned to the feature when it was created

default_enabled.description: Whether the feature flag is enabled by default in new environments

type.description: The type of feature flag. STANDARD for simple on/off flags with an optional value, MULTIVARIATE for flags with multiple weighted value variations

project.description: The ID of the project this feature flag belongs to

is_archived.description: Whether the feature flag is archived and hidden from the dashboard by default

owners.description: The users who are designated as owners of this feature flag

tags.description: The IDs of tags associated with this feature flag for organization

multivariate_options.description: The multivariate value options available for this feature flag when the type is MULTIVARIATE

FeatureOwner.description: A user designated as an owner of a feature flag

id.description: The unique identifier for the user

email.description: The email address of the user

MultivariateOption.description: A value variation for a multivariate feature flag with a percentage allocation

id.description: The unique identifier for this multivariate option

type.description: The data type of the option value

string_value.description: The string value of this option

integer_value.description: The integer value of this option

boolean_value.description: The boolean value of this option

default_percentage_allocation.description: The default percentage of users who will receive this value variation

FeatureState.description: The state of a feature flag within a specific environment, including its enabled status and current value

id.description: The unique identifier for this feature state

feature.description: The ID of the feature flag

enabled.description: Whether the feature flag is currently enabled in this environment

feature_state_value.description: The current value of the feature flag in this environment

identity.description: The identity ID if this is an identity-specific override

feature_segment.description: The feature segment ID if this is a segment override

Segment.description: A segment defining a group of users based on trait-based rules for targeted flag delivery

id.description: The unique identifier for this segment

description.description: A description of the segment and its targeting criteria

project.description: The ID of the project this segment belongs to

rules.description: The rules that define membership in this segment

SegmentRule.description: A rule within a segment combining conditions with logical operators

type.description: The logical operator for combining conditions. ALL requires all conditions to match, ANY requires at least one, NONE requires none to match

rules.description: Nested sub-rules for complex targeting logic

conditions.description: The trait-based conditions that make up this rule

SegmentCondition.description: A condition evaluating a user trait against a value using a comparison operator

operator.description: The comparison operator to use when evaluating the trait

property_.description: The trait key to evaluate against

value.description: The value to compare the trait against

Identity.description: A user identity within an environment with associated traits

id.description: The unique identifier for this identity

identifier.description: The user-provided identifier for this identity, typically a user ID or email

environment.description: The ID of the environment this identity belongs to

traits.description: The traits associated with this identity

Trait.description: A key-value pair associated with an identity used for segment evaluation and personalized flag delivery

id.description: The unique identifier for this trait

trait_key.description: The key name of the trait

trait_value.description: The value of the trait, which can be a string, integer, float, or boolean

transient.description: When true, this trait is used for evaluation only and is not persisted
